title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 12 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 12 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 12 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.81% today, the main contract closed at785.5.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 833-835 yuan/mt,decrease 18-20 yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 850-856 yuan/mt,decrease 13 yuan/mt.According to SMM shipping data, the total global iron ore shipment volume of SMM last week was 29.41 million tons, a decrease of 12.9% month on month, with shipments from Australia and Brazil both decreasing.
